category_sources: source_facts.description says it extracts files from a YAFFS2 filesystem image; Debian package page and upstream README describe extracting YAFFS2 filesystem images.
display_name_sources: Upstream README heading is unyaffs; source_facts.name is unyaffs.
docs_sources: Debian package External Resources lists the GitHub homepage; upstream README is the best official documentation surface with requirements, compiling, usage, and limitations.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; Debian package External Resources links a GitHub homepage for unyaffs, and upstream README notes the maintained fork at github.com/ehlers/unyaffs.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies YAFFS2 filesystem-image extraction; upstream README explains mkyaffs2image compatibility and image extraction usage; current_curation.tags includes cli.
